\caption{Seed-paired uncertainty for the principal CIFAR claims. Each row reports the within-seed mean difference, a percentile-bootstrap $95\%$ interval with $10{,}000$ resamples, paired Cohen's $d_z$, and the two-sided exact Wilcoxon $p$-value. With five nonzero pairs the smallest attainable Wilcoxon $p$-value is $0.0625$. Seeds 0--2 use 1,500 examples per task and seeds 3--4 use 2,500; both methods in every pair use the same seed-specific budget.}
